'''âj-v-k-m''' ('''kajavkemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaternise|quaternise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaternise|quaternise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-v-k-m
|-
! Lemma
| kajavkemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijavkemoko|thijavkemoko]] || [[word:jijavkemoko|jijavkemoko]] || [[word:shijavkemoko|shijavkemoko]] || [[word:kijavkemoko|kijavkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujavkemoko|thuthujavkemoko]] || [[word:jujujavkemoko|jujujavkemoko]] || [[word:shushujavkemoko|shushujavkemoko]] || [[word:kukujavkemoko|kukujavkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujavkemoko|thujavkemoko]] || [[word:jujavkemoko|jujavkemoko]] || [[word:shujavkemoko|shujavkemoko]] || [[word:kujavkemoko|kujavkemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujavkemoko|thujavkemoko]] || [[word:jujavkemoko|jujavkemoko]] || [[word:shujavkemoko|shujavkemoko]] || [[word:kujavkemoko|kujavkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejavkemoko|thejavkemoko]] || [[word:jejavkemoko|jejavkemoko]] || [[word:shejavkemoko|shejavkemoko]] || [[word:kejavkemoko|kejavkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojavkemoko|thothojavkemoko]] || [[word:jojojavkemoko|jojojavkemoko]] || [[word:shoshojavkemoko|shoshojavkemoko]] || [[word:kokojavkemoko|kokojavkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojavkemoko|thojavkemoko]] || [[word:jojavkemoko|jojavkemoko]] || [[word:shojavkemoko|shojavkemoko]] || [[word:kojavkemoko|kojavkemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojavkemoko|thojavkemoko]] || [[word:jojavkemoko|jojavkemoko]] || [[word:shojavkemoko|shojavkemoko]] || [[word:kojavkemoko|kojavkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjavkemoko|thĂŠjavkemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjavkemoko|jĂŠjavkemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjavkemoko|shĂŠjavkemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjavkemoko|kĂŠjavkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajavkemoko|thathajavkemoko]] || [[word:jajajavkemoko|jajajavkemoko]] || [[word:shashajavkemoko|shashajavkemoko]] || [[word:kakajavkemoko|kakajavkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajavkemoko|thajavkemoko]] || [[word:jajavkemoko|jajavkemoko]] || [[word:shajavkemoko|shajavkemoko]] || [[word:kajavkemoko|kajavkemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajavkemoko|thajavkemoko]] || [[word:jajavkemoko|jajavkemoko]] || [[word:shajavkemoko|shajavkemoko]] || [[word:kajavkemoko|kajavkemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajavkemithi|shajavkemithi]] || [[word:shajavkemiji|shajavkemiji]] || [[word:shajavkemishi|shajavkemishi]] || [[word:shajavkemiki|shajavkemiki]]
